nasb.text: The city is laid out as a square, and its length is as great as the width; and he measured the city with the rod, fifteen hundred miles; its length and width and height are equal.

esv.text: The city lies foursquare, its length the same as its width. And he measured the city with his rod, 12,000 stadia. Its length and width and height are equal.

cnv.text: 城是四方的，長寬都一樣。天使用蘆葦量那城，共有二千四百公里，城的長、寬、高都一樣；

ccb.text: 圣城是正方形的，长宽相等。天使用量秆丈量那城，长、宽、高都是两千二百公里。

csbs.text: 那城布置为四方形，长度和宽度一样。天使用芦苇测量那城，有两千两百公里；她的长、宽、高都是相等的。
